We continue to review a slate of filings that have occurred across a variety of jurisdictions across the country lately. This serves as a good preface to todayвҖҷs edition:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_1310,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fd96d3ee0-955b-45e5-905c-3af5607874cf_655x583.png)](https://substack.com/redirect/f82582db-7e43-48a5-999b-1c62564b02fe?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: X, citing Reorg.

Healthcare remains an active sector in вҖҳ24 even if it is down вҖ” on a filing basis вҖ” from вҖҳ23. Notably, there have been a number of out-of-court liability management deals in healthcare so far this year too. Lets dive in to a few recent healthcare situations and much much moreвҖҰ...
